title: Nature Rarer Uses Yellow
content:
Nature rarer uses yellow
    Than another hue;
    Saves she all of that for sunsets, --
    Prodigal of blue,

    Spending scarlet like a woman,
    Yellow she affords
    Only scantly and selectly,
    Like a lover's words.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Emily Elizabeth Dickinson, titled "Nature Rarer Uses Yellow", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
